examples.title: String Length Calculation
examples.description: Program to find length of string without using strlen()
examples.explanation: The program iterates through each character of the string until it encounters the null terminator '\0', incrementing a counter for each character. This mimics what strlen() does internally.

examples.title: String Palindrome Check
examples.description: Program to check if a string is palindrome without using strrev()
examples.explanation: The program uses two pointers starting from both ends of the string. It compares characters moving towards the center. If any pair doesn't match, the string is not a palindrome.

examples.title: String Sorting (Selection Sort)
examples.description: Program to sort array of strings in alphabetical order
examples.explanation: Selection sort is applied to strings. In each iteration, it finds the smallest string (using strcmp) from the unsorted portion and swaps it with the element at the current position using strcpy.

examples.title: Vowel and Consonant Counter
examples.description: Program to count vowels and consonants in a string
examples.explanation: The program iterates through each character, converts it to lowercase using tolower(), checks if it's alphabetic using isalpha(), and then determines if it's a vowel or consonant.
